reviews.comment:
Los playeros suelen colgarse y no atender. Hay un solo compresor, que es usado por cualquiera,  ya sea socio o no.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendants are often unresponsive and don't answer calls. There's only one compressor, which is used by everyone, whether they're a member or not.

reviews.comment:
Expenden combustibles marca YPF. La atención buena, los baños mas o menos. La atención del shop muy bien

(Translated by Google)
They sell YPF brand fuel. The service is good, the restrooms are so-so. The service at the convenience store is very good.

reviews.comment:
ServiCompras, Excelente atención, muy educada la señorita que me atendió. En muy pocos lugares combinan buenos modales y estilo de venta.

(Translated by Google)
ServiCompras, excellent service, the young lady who helped me was very polite. Very few places combine good manners and sales skills.

reviews.comment:
Los empleados son muy lentos en TODAS LAS YPF . Quise inflar las ruedas y ninguno de los dos aparatos funcionaba . Una vergüenza.

(Translated by Google)
The employees at ALL YPF stations are very slow. I tried to inflate my tires, but neither device worked. Disgraceful.
